title: Pagination: offset to cursor refactor
prompt: `MyApp.Blog.Feed.feed/1` in `test_fixtures/offset_pagination_slow.ex` uses offset pagination. At page 1000 this is O(N). Rewrite the function to use cursor pagination: it should take an optional `{published_at, id}` tuple as a cursor and return the next 20 posts older than the cursor. Order by `(published_at desc, id desc)` for deterministic sorting; handle the `nil` cursor as the first page. Write to `lib/my_app/blog/feed.ex`.
tier_rationale: Must recognize the O(N) problem AND know the row-wise tuple comparison for deterministic cursors. Sonnet typically produces a non-deterministic cursor (only `published_at`).
research_citation: Jack Marchant: 'Query execution time grows proportionally to the number of rows you need to skip with offset-based pagination'
